title: EasySprint
description: Always sprint automatically — toggle with one key. Clean HUD indicator shows sprint status
body:
# EasySprint

  A simple, lightweight mod that automatically sprints when you move forward. No more holding Ctrl.

  ## How It Works

  When enabled, your character sprints automatically whenever you walk forward. Just move — you're already sprinting.

  The mod is smart and won't sprint when:
  - You're sneaking
  - You're using an item (eating, blocking, drinking)
  - You're riding a vehicle/horse
  - You're swimming
  - Your hunger is too low

  ## HUD Indicator

  A small status indicator at the top center of your screen:

  - **[Sprint: ON]** (green) — you're currently sprinting
  - **[Sprint: READY]** (yellow) — autosprint is enabled, waiting for movement
  - **[Sprint: OFF]** (red) — autosprint is disabled

  ## Keybind

  | Key | Action |
  |-----|--------|
  | **V** | Toggle EasySprint on/off |

  Rebindable in Controls → "AutoSprint" category.

  ## Supported Versions

  Fabric: 1.20 — 1.21.11, 26.1

  ## Requirements

  - Fabric Loader
  - Fabric API

  ## Client-Side Only

  No server mod needed. Works on any server.
